children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is hereby established within the Department of Justice an Office of Science and Technology (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “Office”).

children.heading: Authority
children.label: 2 Authority
children.text: The Office shall be under the general authority of the Assistant Attorney General, Office of Justice Programs, and shall be established within the National Institute of Justice.

children.heading: Director
children.label: b Director
children.text: The Office shall be headed by a Director, who shall be an individual appointed based on approval by the Office of Personnel Management of the executive qualifications of the individual.
